pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target is deprecated in newer Java versions and may cause warnings or errors; release is the standard for cross-compilation.
